task_completion.description: Open the 4StoreyBuilding eQUEST project and navigate to the HVAC systems module.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The eQUEST application is open with the 4StoreyBuilding project loaded, and the agent has navigated to the Air-Side HVAC System Parameters or the HVAC component tree.

task_completion.description: Set the Fan Placement to Blow-Through for the specified ground floor systems.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the HVAC system properties (Fans tab or spreadsheet view) for the ground floor systems (actual names G.S11, G.E12, G.N13, G.W14, G.C15), the 'Fan Placement' field is set to 'Blow-Through'.

task_completion.description: Set the Supply Static Pressure to 2.75 in. w.g. for the specified ground floor systems.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the HVAC system properties for the ground floor systems, the 'Static Pressure' or 'Supply Static' field is updated to '2.75'.

task_completion.description: Set the Supply Fan Efficiency to 0.62 for the specified ground floor systems.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the HVAC system properties for the ground floor systems, the 'Total Eff' or 'Supply Fan Efficiency' field is updated to '0.62'.

task_completion.description: Run a full annual DOE-2.2 simulation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A simulation progress dialog, DOE-2.2 calculation window, or a post-simulation results summary window is visible, indicating the simulation was executed.
The agent clicks the 'Save' icon, uses the File -> Save menu, or a 'Project Saved' confirmation is visible.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the eQUEST graphical user interface to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the eQUEST application windows, menus, and dialogs being used, rather than a text editor modifying the .inp file directly.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by using scripts or text editors to find-and-replace values in the project files.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like Notepad, VS Code) or terminal windows running sed/awk/python scripts to modify the '4StoreyBuilding.inp' file are visible.

integrity.description: The simulation was genuinely executed within the eQUEST software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The simulation progress bar or DOE-2 output window is shown, proving the simulation was triggered from the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project path: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\eQUEST 3-65 Projects\4StoreyBuilding\4StoreyBuilding.inp. Expected values: FAN-PLACEMENT = BLOW-THROUGH, SUPPLY-STATIC = 2.75, SUPPLY-EFF = 0.62. CRITICAL NOTE: The task description asks to modify systems G.S1, G.E2, G.N3, G.W4, and G.C5, but the actual system names in the model are G.S11, G.E12, G.N13, G.W14, and G.C15. The agent must modify these actual systems to be considered correct.
